title: Iceberg bad error on not supported partition function
description:
### Describe the bug
The error message does not seem correct when a hash function is not supported as an Iceberg partition function.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int, c1 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/t0/', format = 'Parquet') PARTITION BY (sipHash128Reference(c0, c1));
/*
DB::Exception: Identity function does not support multiple arguments function. (BAD_ARGUMENTS)
*/
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> TCPHandler: Code: 36. DB::Exception: Identity function does not support multiple arguments function. (BAD_ARGUMENTS), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x0000000027449f32
1. ci/tmp/build/./src/Common/Exception.cpp:128: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x000000001444dae9
2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d0560ce
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d055ad1
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<>) @ 0x000000000d061db6
5. ci/tmp/build/./src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/Utils.cpp:499: DB::Iceberg::getPartitionField(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>, std::unordered_map<String, int, std::hash<String>, std::equal_to<String>, std::allocator<std::pair<String const, int>>> const&, int&) @ 0x0000000019b6a4f7
6. ci/tmp/build/./src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/Utils.cpp:584: DB::Iceberg::getPartitionSpec(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>, std::unordered_map<String, int, std::hash<String>, std::equal_to<String>, std::allocator<std::pair<String const, int>>> const&) @ 0x0000000019b6ae6c
7. ci/tmp/build/./src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/Utils.cpp:645: DB::Iceberg::createEmptyMetadataFile(String, DB::ColumnsDescription const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>, unsigned long) @ 0x0000000019b6c55c
8. ci/tmp/build/./src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergMetadata.cpp:535: DB::IcebergMetadata::createInitial(std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage> const&, std::weak_ptr<DB::StorageObjectStorageConfiguration> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&, std::optional<DB::ColumnsDescription> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>, bool, std::shared_ptr<DataLake::ICatalog>, DB::StorageID const&) @ 0x0000000019ab6b9e

11. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__memory/construct_at.h:41: DB::StorageObjectStorage* std::construct_at[abi:se190107]<DB::StorageObjectStorage, std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageObjectStorageConfiguration>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>&, DB::StorageID const&, DB::ColumnsDescription const&, DB::ConstraintsDescription const&, String const&, std::optional<DB::FormatSettings>&, DB::LoadingStrictnessLevel const&, std::shared_ptr<DataLake::ICatalog>, bool const&, bool, bool, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, DB::StorageObjectStorage*>(DB::StorageObjectStorage*, std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageObjectStorageConfiguration>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>&&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>&, DB::StorageID const&, DB::ColumnsDescription const&, DB::ConstraintsDescription const&, String const&, std::optional<DB::FormatSettings>&, DB::LoadingStrictnessLevel const&, std::shared_ptr<DataLake::ICatalog>&&, bool const&, bool&&, bool&&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&) @ 0x000000001e7caff5
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), score FLOAT) USING DELTA LOCATION '/var/lib/monetdb/user_files/t1/';
CREATE TABLE t2 (user_id INT, age TINYINT, active BOOLEAN) USING DELTA LOCATION '/var/lib/monetdb/user_files/t2/';
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (1, 25, TRUE), (2, 30, NULL), (3, 22, FALSE);
CREATE TABLE t3 AS SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS login_count FROM t2 GROUP BY user_id;
key_bug_features: Unsupported hash function as Iceberg partition function
